steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: John “attempted to reconcile his mother to the notion” but found it a difficult task. Matty responded with “self-pity and tears” because she found his desires incomprehensible. The context shows John is trying to get past her resistance to an idea she opposes.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Reconciling his mother to the notion means making her accept it.

Choice A (Get his mother to accept) directly matches this meaning.

The other three either describe unrelated actions (apologize for, match) or invoke a different sense of 'reconcile' (reunite with).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
